decision.title: Vite + KAPLAY + TypeScript stack
decision.summary: Use Vite for build tooling, KAPLAY for game rendering, TypeScript for type safety. Same stack as reference implementation.
decision.impact: All game code uses KAPLAY scene/component model. Build output goes to game/dist/.

decision.title: Button-choice navigation, not tile-based
decision.summary: Navigation is choice-driven via room graph exits. Floor map is visual only, movement is by selecting exit buttons. No grid walking.
decision.impact: Game scene renders floor map as visual board but movement is through button clicks on exits.

decision.title: Content as TypeScript modules, not JSON files
decision.summary: For eval scope, content packs (dungeon, entities, runes, spells) are TypeScript modules with exported constants. Could be converted to JSON later.
decision.impact: Content is imported directly, no JSON loading needed. Still content-driven architecture.
